entry.title: Microsoft AutoGen
entry.description: Open-source framework for building multi-agent AI applications, conversations, workflows, and autonomous systems.
entry.seoDescription: Microsoft AutoGen is an open-source framework for multi-agent AI applications, workflows, and autonomous systems.
entry.author: Microsoft
entry.cardDescription: Open-source framework for multi-agent AI applications.
entry.body:
## Editorial notes

AutoGen is a useful reference for multi-agent application patterns, especially where conversation loops and coordination matter.

## Disclosure

Editorial listing. No paid placement or affiliate link is used.
